hotelName: Bellagio Las Vegas United States Of America
reviewText: When we walked into our room, we noticed there were used glasses of water and thr ice bucket had water in it, the garbage was full and the beds looked like someone took a nap on top of the sheets.. we complained and they moved us as well as gave us a credit and the second room was good except the shower had a used bar of soap on the soap shelf… so I was a little disappointed

## Review
When we walked into our room, we noticed there were used glasses of water and thr ice bucket had water in it, the garbage was full and the beds looked like someone took a nap on top of the sheets.. we complained and they moved us as well as gave us a credit and the second room was good except the shower had a used bar of soap on the soap shelf… so I was a little disappointed

hotelName: Bellagio Las Vegas United States Of America
reviewText: The water from faucets smelled horrible. Ice machine didn’t work. Hallway smelled like mildew. The rooms are wayyyyy too far from front desk. The food was mediocre. This place is over priced and in no way worth it. I would NEVER stay here again.
markdownContent:
# Bellagio Las Vegas United States Of America review (Expedia)

**Rating:** 2/10 ★☆☆☆☆
**Travelling as:** Partner
**Sub-ratings:** Cleanliness: 6; Service: 10; Hotel condition: 6; Amenities: 4

## Review
The water from faucets smelled horrible. Ice machine didn’t work. Hallway smelled like mildew. The rooms are wayyyyy too far from front desk. The food was mediocre. This place is over priced and in no way worth it. I would NEVER stay here again.
